title: Valkyrien Skies Copycat Mass Lower
description: This makes all of the copycat blocks from create fabric, create:copycats+ and Steam n' rails super light so you can make cool planes and other things in Valkyrien Skies.
body:
# About
This datapack is designed to improve the compatibility and realism between Create, Create: Copycats+, and Valkyrien Skies by adjusting the mass values of all Copycat blocks. In the base game and mod configuration, Copycat blocks often lack proper mass attributes, leading to inconsistencies when building airships or other physics-based vehicles with Valkyrien Skies. This datapack fixes that by assigning appropriate mass values—set uniformly to ensure fair balance and predictable behavior—across all Copycat variants, including those from Create, Create: Steam ‘n Rails, and Create: Copycats+. The result is a smoother and more realistic experience when using Copycat materials in flight or motion-based builds. Whether you’re constructing lightweight gliders or massive industrial airships, the adjusted mass ensures that every Copycat block behaves consistently within Valkyrien Skies’ physics engine.
## Help
Join my help discord [help discord](https://discord.gg/gwMJytq7uJ)
